taskmanager.model.ScheduleRecommendation

Description

  • Uses of ScheduleRecommendation in taskmanager.api

    Methods in taskmanager.api that return types with arguments of type ScheduleRecommendation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<ScheduleRecommendation>>
    SchedulePlanner.suggestSchedule(List<Task> tasks, WeatherForecast forecast)
    Generates scheduling recommendations based on a list of tasks and a weather forecast.
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<ScheduleRecommendation>>
    SchedulePlanner.suggestScheduleForLocation(List<Task> tasks, String location)
    Generates scheduling recommendations based on tasks and a specific location.

  • Uses of ScheduleRecommendation in taskmanager.impl

    Methods in taskmanager.impl that return types with arguments of type ScheduleRecommendation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<ScheduleRecommendation>>
    SchedulePlannerImpl.suggestSchedule(List<Task> tasks, WeatherForecast forecast)
    Suggests a schedule using a provided weather forecast.
    reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<ScheduleRecommendation>>
    SchedulePlannerImpl.suggestScheduleForLocation(List<Task> tasks, String location)
    Suggests a schedule for tasks based on real-time weather data for a given location.
